mapper.select: select role_id from osh_user_role where user_id = #{userId} and delete_flag = 0 and (expire_time is null or expire_time > now())

select r.role_code from osh_user_role ur join osh_role r on ur.role_id = r.id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and ur.delete_flag = 0 and (ur.expire_time is null or ur.expire_time > now()) and r.delete_flag = 0 and r.status = 1 limit 1
mapper.update: update osh_user_role set delete_flag = 1 where user_id = #{userId}
